zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight於1383年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯時，他的父親Richard Whetehill II33歲，母親Mrs. Richard Whetehill II27歲。他於1415年2月7日與Joan Astley在英國威爾斯丹比爾盧結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1450年在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight于1383年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯时，他的父亲Richard Whetehill II33岁，母亲Mrs. Richard Whetehill II27岁。他于1415年2月7日与Joan Astley在英国威尔斯丹比爾盧结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1450年在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Whetehill,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Renfrewshire, Bute, and Lanarkshire) and English (Lancashire): habitational name from any of various minor places called Whitehill, in Scotland, northern England, and elsewhere.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight was born in 1383, in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Richard Whetehill II, was 33 and his mother, Mrs. Richard Whetehill II, was 27. He married Joan Astley on 7 February 1415, in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1450, in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight est né en 1383, à Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Richard Whetehill II, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Richard Whetehill II, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Joan Astley le 7 février 1415, à Ruthin, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1450, à Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight(이)가 1383년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Whetehill II(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Richard Whetehill II(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1415년 2월 7일 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루스인에서 Joan Astley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 브라이브룩에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Astley 7 февраля 1415 г. в местности рутин, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1450 г. в местности брэибрук, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.
